title: Serpent weaponry
description:
🐍 Serpent Weaponry

Serpent Weaponry is a combat-focused mod for Minecraft 1.21.1 that introduces a deadly collection of new melee weapons.
body:
###  🐍 **Serpent Weaponry**

Serpent Weaponry is a combat-focused mod for Minecraft 1.21.1 that introduces a deadly collection of new melee weapons. Whether you prefer the slow, crushing power of a hammer or the swift, precise strikes of a dagger, this mod has something for every combat style.

Built with **Better Combat** in mind, every weapon features unique animations, reach, and handling to make every fight feel visceral and rewarding.

### ✨ **Key Features**

Expanded Armory: Adds 4 new weapon types across all vanilla tiers (Stone, Gold, Iron, Diamond, and Netherite).

  Unique Weapon Classes:

🗡️ Daggers: Fast, short-range weapons for quick skirmishes.

⚔️ Greatswords: Massive blades with extended reach and heavy damage.

🔱 Spears: Keep your enemies at a distance with superior thrusting range.

🔨 Hammers: Heavy-hitting tools of destruction.

### 🌟 **Special Abilities**

Midas' Greed (Golden Weapons): To make Gold tier more viable, all golden weapons from this mod have a passive experience boost. Killing mobs with golden weaponry will drop significantly more experience points, making them the perfect tools for XP farming!
